known_limitations: This milestone creates a SLSA-verifiable release artifact candidate, not external SLSA certification.
The official SLSA generic reusable workflow requires the v2.1.0 tag ref; Atlas records the resolved tag commit as metadata.
Atlas production status remains a local contract, not external audit, certification, legal compliance, or enterprise deployment approval.
Release artifacts and provenance are metadata-bound and verifier-readable, but artifact files are not individually signed by Atlas.
